subcodes.first_line: O bond-slave of the Blessed Beauty! Such is the hope cherished through God's hidden favors that thou mayest become a servant of Jamal-Husayn [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده جمال مبارک امید از الطاف خفیه الهیه چنانست که عبد جمال حسین گردی و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
